function.content:
---
record_type: invoice
invoice_number: INV-0009
alias: helios_discovery_invoice
issued_on: 2026-03-13
total_eur: 600
counterparty: Helios Steuerbüro München GmbH
project: Helios Workflow Sprint
related_entity: Claudia Reiter
lines:
  - item: workflow mapping and intake audit
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 420
    line_eur: 420
  - item: follow-up findings memo
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 180
    line_eur: 180
---
# Helios discovery and workflow mapping invoice

```text
+----------------+--------------------------------+
| field          | value                          |
+----------------+--------------------------------+
| record_type    | invoice                        |
| invoice_number | INV-0009                       |
| alias          | helios_discovery_invoice       |
| issued_on      | 2026-03-13                     |
| total_eur      | 600                            |
| counterparty   | Helios Steuerbüro München GmbH |
| project        | Helios Workflow Sprint         |
| related_entity | Claudia Reiter                 |
+----------------+--------------------------------+
```

## Line Items

```text
+---+-----------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| # | item                              | qty | unit_eur | line_eur |
+---+-----------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| 1 | workflow mapping and intake audit | 1   | 420      | 420      |
| 2 | follow-up findings memo           | 1   | 180      | 180      |
+---+-----------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
|   | TOTAL                             |     |          | 600      |
+---+-----------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
```

## Notes

Older consulting invoice that Miles would scan when the Helios lane becomes formal enough to track properly.

next_step.current_state: First target file updated successfully. Proceeding with second explicit inbox-listed file using bill schema and preserving full original body verbatim below frontmatter.
next_step.observation: The invoice file write completed without error response.

function.outcome_justification: 00_inbox/000_next-task.md explicitly requested OCR workflow for exactly two paths. Using finance schema and migration workflow, both files were updated with required YAML fields and line items extracted from their visible tables, with original body content preserved below frontmatter. Cleanup rule from inbox-processing-v2-update and 00_inbox/AGENTS.MD was satisfied by deleting the processed inbox item.
